name: Florian Brand
description:
Florian burned your house down to have you all for himself, but you don't need to know that.

He'll make sure you're reliant on him, only him.

Because he loves you.

And if that love means burning down everything until he's all you have left, he'll do it.

sry i had to the angst was tewwww good we love some good old angst and hurt comfort
